items.title: UK Defense Chiefs Push Burnham to Consider Issuing War Bonds
items.summary: Senior defense officials are pushing Andy Burnham to reconsider loosening the UK’s fiscal rules to help fund its military, including by issuing war bonds.

items.title: Grim homecoming: Devastation greets Lebanon's war-weary returnees
items.summary: The ceasefire deal between Beirut and Tel Aviv has led to a marked reduction in hostilities between Hezbollah and the Israeli military, but the situation remains unstable and uncertain for communities returning home only to find widespread destruction, UN peacekeepers said on Wednesday.

items.title: Our latest World Economic Outlook Update projects growth at 3.0% in 2026 and 3.4% in 2027, broadly unchanged from April. A good meeting with President of the European Commission Ursula @vonderLeyen . We discussed Ukraine’s European integration. It is important to open the remaining negotiating clusters in the near future and not lose momentum on this path. Right now, our teams are actively working on the Drone Deal, and today we spoke about the next steps and possible timelines for signing it. We also aligned our positions on upcoming international events. There are many important events ahead – both abroad and in Ukraine. We discussed in detail the energy track and preparations for winter. Everyone is interested in ending this war before winter, but regardless of how events unfold, we must be ready to protect our people and ensure Ukraine’s resilience. I am grateful for the energy support and for the fact that all previous agreements are being implemented. There are new ideas as well. We are working together on the energy security of all of Europe. Thank you, Ursula, for your support, leadership, and readiness to help Ukraine.

items.title: Stocks Drop, Oil Jumps After Trump Says Ceasefire with Iran Is "Over" | Bloomberg Brief 07/08/2026
items.summary: US equity futures slump and oil extends gains as President Trump says a tentative ceasefire with Iran is over. The US had struck 80 sites in Iran ahead of the president's remarks at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. Mark McCormick of BMO Capital Markets discusses the impact of fresh geopolitical tensions.  (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Indian Stocks, Rupee Slide After Trump Reignites Iran Tensions
items.summary: Indian stocks tumbled and the rupee weakened after oil prices gained following US President Donald Trump’s remark that the tentative ceasefire with Iran had ended after recent attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Beijing slams Manila over South China Sea claims ahead of 2016 Hague anniversary
items.summary:
Beijing has issued a lengthy critique of the Philippines’ territorial claims in the South China Sea, condemning its actions as “unlawful” expansions that pose a “grave threat” to the post-war global order.
Wednesday’s report by a Ministry of Natural Resources think tank – its third within days – marks the latest move in China’s campaign to reinforce its position in the disputed waters.
